scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build:web: npm run clean:spa-dist && npx vite build --mode preact
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.vercel-build: npm run clean:spa-dist && npx vite build
scripts.validate:core: npm run baseline:check && npm run test:publish-orchestration && npm run test:phase4 && npm run lint:phase4
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run guardrails:check
scripts.guardrails:check: npm run guard:console:check && npm run guard:eslint-disable:check
scripts.preflight:phase0: npm run check && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.test:unit: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run --config vitest.config.mjs --configLoader native --project=server --project=client
scripts.test:wave1b: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/routes/monte-carlo-api.test.ts tests/unit/routes/ai-api.test.ts tests/unit/api/variance-tracking-api.test.ts tests/unit/routes/wave1b-tail-api.test.ts
scripts.test:wave1b:runtime: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/routes/monte-carlo-api.test.ts tests/unit/routes/ai-api.test.ts tests/unit/api/variance-tracking-api.test.ts tests/unit/routes/wave1b-tail-api.test.ts tests/unit/services/monte-carlo-engine.test.ts tests/unit/services/power-law-distribution.test.ts tests/unit/services/variance-tracking.test.ts tests/unit/services/time-travel-analytics.test.ts tests/unit/api/time-travel-api.test.ts tests/unit/circuit-breaker.test.ts tests/unit/portfolio-optimization/portfolio-optimization-service.test.ts tests/unit/cache/server-cache.test.ts tests/unit/services/lp-cache.test.ts tests/unit/services/cache-invalidation-service.test.ts tests/unit/services/cache-warming-service.test.ts tests/unit/websocket/websocket-index.test.ts tests/unit/websocket/portfolio-metrics.test.ts
scripts.test:wave2: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/cache/predictive-cache-characterization.test.tsx tests/unit/cache/cache-strategy.test.tsx tests/unit/hooks/useAgentStream.test.tsx tests/unit/validation/validation-helpers.test.ts tests/unit/lib/path-utils.test.tsx tests/unit/lib/resilient-api-client.test.tsx tests/unit/lib/telemetry.test.tsx tests/unit/lib/env-detection.test.tsx tests/unit/api/reserve-engine-client.test.tsx tests/unit/core/feature-flags.test.tsx tests/unit/services/funds.idempotency.test.tsx tests/unit/normalize-create-fund-response.test.tsx
scripts.test:wave3: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/components/enhanced-field.test.tsx tests/unit/components/premium-select.test.tsx tests/unit/hooks/useAI.test.tsx tests/unit/hooks/use-graduation.test.tsx tests/unit/lib/quarter-time.test.ts tests/unit/lib/storage.test.ts tests/unit/shared/useFlags.test.tsx tests/unit/stores/useFundStore.test.ts tests/unit/stores/useFundStore.idempotency.test.ts tests/unit/stores/fund-store-stability.test.ts tests/unit/components/ai-enhanced-components.test.tsx tests/unit/modeling-wizard-persistence.test.tsx tests/unit/machines/modeling-wizard-fundid.test.tsx
scripts.test:wave4: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/reserves-v11.test.ts tests/unit/reserves/ConstrainedReserveEngine.test.ts tests/unit/reserves/adapter-toEngineGraduationRates.test.ts tests/unit/reserves/computeReservesFromGraduation.test.ts tests/unit/lib/cashflow-generate.test.ts tests/unit/engines/graduation-rate-engine.test.ts tests/unit/cohorts/resolvers.test.ts tests/unit/fee-calculations.test.ts tests/unit/fund-calc-fee-horizon.test.ts tests/unit/truth-cases/capital-allocation.test.ts tests/unit/lib/wizard-calculations.test.ts tests/unit/wizard-reserve-bridge.test.ts
scripts.test:wave5:root: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/lib/logger.test.ts tests/unit/lib/vitals.test.ts tests/unit/debug/wizard-trace.test.ts tests/unit/debug/fetch-tap.test.ts tests/unit/monitoring/noop.test.ts tests/unit/queues/backtesting-queue.test.ts tests/unit/components/ui/NumericInput.test.tsx tests/unit/units.test.ts
scripts.test:wave5:integration: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/integration/report-queue.test.ts --config vitest.config.int.ts
scripts.test:wave5: npm run test:wave5:root && npm run test:wave5:integration
scripts.lint:wave6:residual: eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 0 server/security/integration-guide.ts server/routes/simulations-guarded.example.ts server/engine/fault-injector.ts server/queues/simulation-queue.ts server/websocket.ts server/workers/lp-materialized-view-refresh.ts server/queues/backtesting-queue.ts server/queues/report-generation-queue.ts server/workers/scenarioGeneratorWorker.ts server/utils/singleflight-enhanced.ts server/workers/capital-call-status-worker.ts client/src/workers/simulation.worker.ts client/src/workers/strategy.worker.ts client/src/config/runtime.ts server/websocket/dev-dashboard.ts server/routes/dev-dashboard.ts server/vite.ts server/observability/metrics-demo.ts packages/agent-core/backtest-runner.ts packages/agent-core/src/Backtest.ts packages/agent-core/src/cache/UpstashAdapter.ts packages/agent-core/src/PatternLearning.ts packages/agent-core/src/SerializationHelper.ts packages/agent-core/src/Logger.ts packages/agent-core/src/HybridMemoryManager.ts packages/agent-core/vitest.config.ts packages/codex-review-agent/src/CodexReviewAgent.ts packages/test-repair-agent/src/TestRepairAgent.ts packages/bundle-optimization-agent/src/BundleOptimizationAgent.ts packages/bundle-optimization-agent/vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:wave6:ops: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/queues/backtesting-queue.test.ts tests/unit/workers/capital-call-status-worker.test.ts tests/unit/websocket/websocket-index.test.ts && cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/integration/report-queue.test.ts --config vitest.config.int.ts
scripts.test:wave6:dev-runtime: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/routes/dev-dashboard-api.test.ts tests/unit/websocket/dev-dashboard.test.ts tests/unit/server/vite.test.ts tests/unit/server/websocket.test.ts
scripts.test:wave6:packages: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run --root packages/agent-core --config vitest.config.ts src/__tests__/Backtest.test.ts src/__tests__/PatternLearning.test.ts && cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run --root packages/test-repair-agent --config ../../vitest.config.base.ts src/__tests__/evaluator-optimizer.test.ts && cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run --root packages/bundle-optimization-agent --config vitest.config.ts src/__tests__/BundleOptimizationAgent.test.ts
scripts.validate:wave6: npm run lint:wave6:residual && npm run test:wave6:ops && npm run test:wave6:client-workers && npm run test:wave6:dev-runtime && npm run test:wave6:packages
scripts.lint:wave4: eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 0 client/src/lib/reserves-v11.ts shared/lib/reserves-v11.ts client/src/core/reserves/ConstrainedReserveEngine.ts shared/core/reserves/ConstrainedReserveEngine.ts client/src/core/reserves/adapter/toEngineGraduationRates.ts client/src/core/reserves/computeReservesFromGraduation.ts client/src/lib/cashflow/generate.ts schema/src/index.ts client/src/core/capitalAllocation/periodLoopEngine.ts client/src/lib/fund-calc-v2.ts client/src/core/graduation/GraduationRateEngine.ts client/src/core/cohorts/resolvers.ts client/src/core/types/fund-domain.ts client/src/lib/fee-calculations.ts tests/unit/reserves-v11.test.ts tests/unit/reserves/ConstrainedReserveEngine.test.ts tests/unit/reserves/adapter-toEngineGraduationRates.test.ts tests/unit/reserves/computeReservesFromGraduation.test.ts tests/unit/lib/cashflow-generate.test.ts tests/unit/engines/graduation-rate-engine.test.ts tests/unit/cohorts/resolvers.test.ts tests/unit/fee-calculations.test.ts tests/unit/fund-calc-fee-horizon.test.ts tests/unit/truth-cases/capital-allocation.test.ts tests/unit/lib/wizard-calculations.test.ts tests/unit/wizard-reserve-bridge.test.ts
scripts.lint:wave5:policy: eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 0 client/src/lib/logger.ts client/src/debug/wizard-trace.ts client/src/lib/error-boundary.ts client/src/debug/fetch-tap.ts client/src/monitoring/noop.ts client/src/vitals.ts tests/unit/lib/logger.test.ts tests/unit/lib/vitals.test.ts tests/unit/debug/wizard-trace.test.ts tests/unit/debug/fetch-tap.test.ts tests/unit/monitoring/noop.test.ts
scripts.test:phase4:server: cross-env TZ=UTC vitest run tests/unit/bootstrap/ready-file-handshake.test.ts tests/unit/contract/funds-endpoint-snapshots.test.ts tests/unit/contract/funds-route-ownership.test.ts tests/unit/contract/funds-boundary-guard.test.ts tests/unit/engines/reserve-engine.test.ts tests/unit/engines/pacing-engine.test.ts tests/unit/engines/cohort-engine.test.ts tests/unit/fund-calc-fee-horizon.test.ts --project=server
scripts.test:phase4: npm run test:phase4:server && npm run test:phase4:client && npm run test:phase4:integration
scripts.lint:phase4:strict: eslint --no-cache --no-ignore --max-warnings 0 server/routes.ts server/routes/funds.ts server/routes/calculations.ts server/services/projected-metrics-calculator.ts server/contracts/funds-endpoint-ownership.ts shared/core/reserves/ReserveEngine.ts shared/core/pacing/PacingEngine.ts shared/core/cohorts/CohortEngine.ts shared/lib/fund-calc.ts shared/utils/pLimit.ts shared/utils/resilientLimit.ts client/src/core/reserves/ReserveEngine.ts client/src/core/pacing/PacingEngine.ts client/src/core/cohorts/CohortEngine.ts client/src/lib/fund-calc.ts client/src/utils/pLimit.ts client/src/utils/resilientLimit.ts tests/unit/contract/funds-endpoint-snapshots.test.ts tests/unit/contract/funds-route-ownership.test.ts tests/unit/contract/funds-boundary-guard.test.ts
scripts.lint:phase4: npm run lint:phase4:strict && npm run guard:phase4:workers:check
scripts.validate:phase4: npm run test:phase4 && npm run lint:phase4
